title: ceratostylis nivea
intro: Ceratostylis nivea, also known as the white flowering Ceratostylis, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of health issues including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Ceratostylis nivea are attributed to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which help to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and clear mucus from the lungs. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
